---
title: Week 11 Resources
nocite: |
  @gelman2013bda-ch16
  @burkner2017brms
  @king1989unifying
  @humphreys2015mixing
  @stegmueller2013many
  @jackman2000estimation
  @grimmer2010bayesian
  @linzer2015global
  @lauderdale2014supreme
  @claassen2019estimating
  @clinton2004statistical
---

::: {#refs}
:::
